message:
fix: add 'database is read only' to isRetryableError() for transient Dolt recovery (dolt-test-ajso)

When the Dolt server enters read-only mode under load, the error
'cannot update manifest: database is read only' was treated as permanent.
This clears after a server restart, so it should be retryable.

Also filed gt-kzl2t for the companion gastown isDoltOptimisticLockError() change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/jasper
Rig: beads
Role: polecats

files.patch:
@@ -48,6 +48,16 @@ func TestIsRetryableError(t *testing.T) {
 			err:      errors.New("dial tcp: connection refused"),
 			expected: true,
 		},
+		{
+			name:     "database is read only - retryable",
+			err:      errors.New("cannot update manifest: database is read only"),
+			expected: true,
+		},
+		{
+			name:     "Database Is Read Only (case insensitive)",
+			err:      errors.New("Database Is Read Only"),
+			expected: true,
+		},
 		{
 			name:     "syntax error - not retryable",
 			err:      errors.New("Error 1064: You have an error in your SQL syntax"),
